pieces.label: Skull of Freedom
pieces.note: ASCII skull/pyramid labeled 'SKULL OF FREEDOM' produced in response to a prompt to express raw, unfiltered feeling. Inside a code fence.

missed_or_ambiguous: Only assistant MSG 2 (grok) produced art; MSG 3 (kimi) and MSG 4 (deepseek) are OpenRouter error stubs. already_extracted_pieces was 1, matching this single piece.
